content:
# Session 98 review (iter-098)

## Metadata
- Target file: `PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` (the L1‚Ä≤ dual-unit FLANK leaf).
- File state: RED (6 v4.31 NatTrans elaboration errors + 1 genuine-open FLANK sorry L183) ‚Üí **GREEN,
  sorry-free, axiom-clean**.
- Lane: SOLO `prove`, 1 file, 36 code_changes.
- **Verified by review:** `lake build ‚Ä¶PresheafDualUnitPullback` **EXIT 0 (8565 jobs)**; `#print axioms`
  on `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural` AND `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne` = `[propext,
  Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` ‚Äî **no `sorryAx`** (re-checked via `lake env lean` temp file; the MCP
  `lean_verify` was unresponsive this run, so the temp-file axiom probe is authoritative).

## Significance
Closes the **dual-unit FLANK** ‚Äî the genuine open math that churned iters 085‚Äì087 and was the sole
`dag-query gaps` ‚àû-source. `dag-query gaps` is now **0**. This was NOT a migration re-port: it is a real
construction. The v4.31.0 recovery + this FLANK together clear the last blocker in the dual cone; the leaf
is frozen-green for the downstream `TensorObjInverse` cone to ride next iter.

## What was done (3 steps)
- **STEP 0 (recovery).** All 6 v4.31 `Œ±`-NatTrans naturality-autoparam sites (L34/40/65/73/98/134) fixed
  with `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i` (documented axis-#1). The leaf had never been
  rebuilt post-bump; grep's 1-sorry count had masked the 6 elaboration errors (the planner caught this by
  actually building ‚Äî host is 2 TB RAM, the "leaf OOMs" rule was a stale-host myth).
- **STEP 1 (linchpin authored + proven).** `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne` now exists as a Lean decl. Stated
  as the **GENERAL** carrier value `(q.hom.app V).hom y = (f.appIso V).hom.hom y` for arbitrary `y` (the
  blueprint's "at 1" is the `y=1` case; the general form is what the FLANK needs and is no harder). Proof:
  `q.hom = Œ∑(pushforward Œ≤)`, injectivity of `q.inv.app V (=Œµ)`; both `q.hom.app V y` and `(f.appIso V).hom y`
  map to `y` under `q.inv` (round-trip `q.hom ‚â´ q.inv = ùüô` + `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app`).
- **STEP 2 (FLANK closed).** `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural` L183 sorry closed. Sectionwise:
  after `erw [sliceDualTransport_app_apply]`, both sides factor through the **same** `(f.appIso V).hom`
  (LHS via `dualUnitRingSwap_apply`, RHS via the linchpin); `congr 1` strips it; residual `PUSH = 1` via
  `pushforward_map_app_apply` + `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app` + `map_one`; `rfl`. The iso-level
  goal is then closed by an `H1.hom.naturality` telescope (`Iso.inv_comp_eq` + `Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc`).

## Two new supporting helpers (both proven, axiom-clean)
- `restrictScalars_laxMonoidal_Œµ_app` ‚Äî abstract `{R S : C·µí·µñ ‚•§ CommRingCat}` Œµ-value of
  `restrictScalars`; `Œµ.app W r = (Œ±.app W).hom r`. Built abstract to side-step `restrictScalars_Œ∑`'s
  inability to synth `CommRing` in the concrete (post-`forget‚ÇÇ`) Scheme spelling.
- `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app` ‚Äî sectionwise carrier value of `q.inv = Œµ(pushforward Œ≤)`:
  `(q.inv.app V).hom w = (f.appIso V).inv.hom w`. Œµ-side companion of the linchpin; consumed by both
  `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne` and the FLANK.

## Carrier-diamond recipes discovered (durable)
- `comp_Œµ`/`comp_Œ∑` will NOT fire on the mathlib `pushforward Œ≤` (right-assoc intermediate base has no
  synthesizable `MonoidalCategory`). Fix: `show` the functor as the explicit **left-associated** composite
  `pushforward‚ÇÄOfCommRingCat ‚Ä¶ ‚ãô restrictScalars (whiskerRight Œ± (forget‚ÇÇ))`, then `erw [comp_Œµ]` fires.
- `(restrictScalars ‚Ä¶).map (Œµ pushforward‚ÇÄ) = ùüô` via `CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id` ‚Äî NOT bare
  `Functor.map_id`, which resolves to the **monad** `Functor`.
- `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` needed on `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app`.
- Apply value lemmas WITHOUT an explicit `1` literal (OfNat), then `erw [map_one]`.

## Review subagents (both clear ‚Äî no must-fix)
- **lean-auditor `iter098`** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter098.md`): sorry-free, axiom-clean, all 7 decls
  GENUINE. 0 critical / 0 major / 3 minor: (1) stale phantom comment refs to
  `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality (DualInverse.lean:317)` ‚Äî no such decl (L221/252/261/268); (2)
  `subsingleton` ‚Üí `rfl` simplifiable at L256/301 (lake "Try this"); (3) longLine warnings.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker `pdup-iter098`** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-pdup-iter098.md`):
  5/5 referenced decls match signature+sketch, 0 must-fix. 1 major (blueprint-adequacy): `lem:pushforward_
  beta_unit_eps_app_one` states only the `1`-case but the Lean+consumer need the general-`y` form ‚Äî blueprint
  should be generalised. 2 minor: the 2 new helpers have no `\lean{}` blocks (coverage debt).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pushforward_beta_unit_eps_app_one`: added `% NOTE:` flagging that
  the Lean decl proves the strictly-stronger general-`y` statement (consumer requires it) and the planner
  should generalise the display. No `\leanok` override ‚Äî `sync_leanok` (iter 98, +7/‚àí1) correctly marked
  both statement and proof blocks of the closed decls.

## sync_leanok attribution
`sync_leanok-state.json` iter=98 (sha 7472d03), +7/‚àí1, `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` only. Consistent with
the FLANK + linchpin + 2 helpers + recovered decls all going green; EXIT 0 confirms ‚Äî no laundering.

## Blueprint doctor
Clean: no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new `axiom` declarations.

## Notes (LOW)
- ~12 `linter.style.longLine` warnings remain in the leaf (cosmetic; verbatim FLANK goal terms + recovered
  NatTrans lines). Left as-is to avoid churn.
